Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The original flow starts with receiving a customer request checks if its standard or custom then branches into different paths For standard theres parallel checks credit and inventory then calculate delivery date For custom feasibility analysis then either prepare quotation or reject After both paths theres a check for approval needed leading to manager approval or generating invoice Finally send confirmation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The goal is to optimize this Lets break down each part The user wants to reduce turnaround time and handle non standard requests better So where are the bottlenecks Maybe the parallel checks in the standard path could be automated Also the custom path might take longer due to feasibility analysis and possible rejections The approval process could be a delay if its manual

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Automation Maybe automate the standard validation tasks Credit and inventory checks could be done automatically Also generating invoices or quotations could be automated

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Dynamic resource allocation If theres a surge in custom requests maybe allocate more resources to that path

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Predictive analytics Use data to predict which requests are likely to be custom or need approval Then route them early For example if a customer has a history of custom requests flag it upfront

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: If we can predict the type earlier maybe even before the request is fully processed that could help So inserting a predictive model at the start to classify the request as standard or custom or even predict the need for approval

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: In the standard path the parallel checks credit and inventory could be automated Maybe use APIs to pull credit scores and inventory levels in real time That would speed up Task B1 and the parallel tasks

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For the custom path the feasibility analysis Task B2 might be time consuming Maybe break it down into automated checks where possible For example check if the customization is within existing capabilities using a knowledge base or AI

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The approval process Task F and subsequent gates could be optimized If predictive analytics can determine that a request is likely to be approved maybe fast track it Or use automated approval for low risk cases For high risk escalate to manager Also if approval is denied looping back to E1 or D might cause delays Maybe have a more iterative process here with automated re evaluation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: New decision gateways After the initial request a predictive gateway that routes based on likelihood of customization or approval need Also maybe a gateway after feasibility analysis to determine if its a simple or complex customization routing to different processes

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Subprocesses Maybe a subprocess for handling predicted custom requests which includes pre checks or automated feasibility steps Another subprocess for approval handling with automated decisions based on risk scores

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - IND
Text: Operational complexity Adding predictive models and automation might increase initial setup complexity but reduce manual work later Need to balance

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Customer satisfaction Faster processing times especially for standard requests and better handling of custom ones by anticipating needs Proactive routing could reduce delays

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Potential changes to tasks Task A Add predictive analytics to classify request type and approval need upfront Task B1 Automate standard validation using APIs Parallel checks C1 C2 Automate with real time data Task B2 Use AI to assist in feasibility analysis maybe breaking into automated and manual steps Approval process F G H Implement automated approval for low risk dynamic routing based on risk Loop back from H Instead of looping back maybe have a re evaluation subprocess with automated adjustments

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: New gateways After Start Event Predictive Routing Gateway using ML model to route to standard custom paths or even pre approve After Task B2 Complexity Assessment Gateway to split into simple automated vs complex manual customization After Approval Needed Gateway Risk Assessment Gateway to decide automated vs manual approval

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Subprocesses Automated Pre Validation Subprocess For predicted standard requests run checks in parallel early Dynamic Resource Allocation Subprocess Monitor incoming requests and allocate resources human or computational to bottlenecks Predictive Re routing Subprocess If a request is predicted to need customization start gathering necessary info early

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Impact on performance Reduced time for standard requests due to automation and parallel processing Custom requests handled more efficiently with early routing and AI assistance Approval delays minimized with automated decisions

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Customer satisfaction Faster responses more personalized handling of custom requests fewer delays

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Operational complexity Initial setup for predictive models and automation requires investment Need training for staff to handle new systems Monitoring and maintenance of automated systems However long term benefits in efficiency and scalability

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Potential challenges Ensuring accuracy of predictive models to avoid misrouting Handling edge cases where automation fails Training staff to work with new systems Data privacy concerns with predictive analytics
